creator: volf@oasis.IAEhv.nl
text:
The port of fvwm95 (fvwm95-2.0.43a-Autoconf) does not install the manual
page for fvwm95.
The package of fvwm95 on the FreeBSD-2.2.2 cdrom does not contain the
manual page
The man page is however available in the fvwm95 archive file (in the
subdirectory fvwm and it is called fvwm95.man)

Fix: 

Please install man page.
